title: solanum phureja subsp. estradae
intro: Solanum phureja subsp. estradae, also known as estrada's potato, is a wild potato species native to South America. This plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including glycoalkaloids, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of estrada's potato include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, as well as potential cardiovascular and neuroprotective effects. Traditionally, estrada's potato is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
